linting.notes: No linting configuration files present. yamllint and shellcheck can be used but are not configured in the repository. yamllint found style warnings (missing document-start markers) but no syntax errors.

testing.notes: No test suite found. This is a documentation/demo repository containing Kueue examples and an update-readme script. No automated tests are present.

ci.notes: No CI/CD configuration found. No GitHub Actions workflows, no other CI systems detected.

build.install_command: apk add --no-cache make findutils grep sed gawk
build.notes: Single Makefile target 'update-readme' that syncs YAML content into README files. This is a maintenance/documentation tool, not a build in the traditional sense.

conventions.notes: Demo structure: demos/{demo-name}/README.md contains documentation, demos/{demo-name}/resources/ contains Kubernetes YAML manifests. READMEs embed YAML content using markers <!-- YAML-START: path --> / <!-- YAML-END -->. The update-readme.sh script keeps these in sync.

setup_commands: apk add --no-cache make findutils grep sed gawk

lint_commands.notes: YAML validation found style warnings (missing document-start markers) but no errors. Exit code 0.

container_recipe.notes: The primary validation is running 'make update-readme' to ensure the script executes successfully. No formal test suite exists.
